About the Tournament

A Grand Tribute to Arushi

The 1st Arushi Memorial Open is an International FIDE Rapid Rating Chess Tournament hosted in the heritage city of Vadodara. Conducted under FIDE Laws of Chess and Swiss System pairing, this event promises a world-class competitive experience.

Organised under the aegis of the Gujarat State Chess Association (GSCA) and All India Chess Federation (AICF), the tournament welcomes players of all ratings — from unrated beginners to rated professionals.

  • Event Name 1st Arushi Memorial Open International FIDE Rapid Rating Chess Tournament 2026
  • Date 9th August 2026
  • Start Time 9:00 AM
  • Close Time 7:00 PM
  • Rounds 8 Rounds (Swiss System)
  • Time Control 15 min + 5 sec bonus (Fischer)
  • Entry Fee Maximum ₹1,000/-
  • Organiser Shailesh Rawal, Vadodara
  • Address E-503, Aranya Flats, Bh. CNG Pump, Harni Link Road, Vadodara

Participation

Entry Fee & Payment

MAXIMUM ENTRY FEE

₹1,000/-

Entry fee is charged per player. Payment must be completed before the start of the tournament.

AICF Registration for 2026–2027 is compulsory and must be completed online before the event.

⚠ Note: Registration will be confirmed only after payment. Organisers reserve the right to accept or reject entries.

Regulations

Tournament Rules

01 The tournament is played under FIDE Laws of Chess using the Swiss System pairing.
02 Time control: 15 minutes + 5 seconds increment per move (Fischer).
03 Open to all Indian players — rated and unrated. Foreign players require a valid FIDE ID (FIN).
04 A player shall be eligible for only one higher cash prize. Prizes are not cumulative.
05 All prize winners must be present at the prize distribution ceremony to claim their prizes.
06 Registration confirmed only after payment. No refund policy.
07 Mobile phones and electronic devices are strictly prohibited inside the tournament hall.
08 Tie-breaks (in order): Buchholz Cut 1 → Buchholz All → Sonneborn-Berger → Direct Encounter → No. of Wins → Wins with Black.
09 Any player/parent disrupting the tournament will face exclusion without refund.
10 Protest fee of ₹2,000/- (refunded if appeal is upheld) within 10 minutes of incident.
11 AICF Registration 2026–27 is compulsory. Online payment only.
12 Organiser's decision is final and binding in all matters.
1st Arushi Memorial Open — International FIDE Rapid Rating Chess Tournament 2026

9th August 2026 · Regenta Inn, Vadodara · Gujarat, India

Conducted under Gujarat State Chess Association (GSCA) & All India Chess Federation (AICF)

Organiser: Shailesh Rawal  |  E-503, Aranya Flats, Bh. CNG Pump, Harni Link Road, Vadodara  |  Join WhatsApp Group
